name: PocketGen
description: Generate high-fidelity protein pockets with superior binding affinity and structural validity. Operates ten times faster than physics-based methods and achieves a 95% success rate, defined as the percentage of generated pockets with higher binding affinity than reference pockets.
capabilities: Generate high-fidelity protein pockets with superior binding affinity and structural validity
Operates ten times faster than physics-based methods and achieves a 95% success rate, defined as the percentage of generated pockets with higher binding affinity than reference pockets

pdbFile.description: Protein structure in PDB format containing the binding pocket

ligandFile.description: Ligand structure in SDF format for pocket generation

numDesigns.description: Number of pocket designs to generate
